name: search
description: Pencarian per komunitas (fase-2 #23 + #29): member-only full-text search atas judul kelas published (courses.search_title, take 10) + isi materi (lessons.search_content, take 15) dengan draft-guard — lesson milik kelas non-published dibuang di query — + papan sumber APPROVED-only (index by_tenant_status, take 50, filter judul in-memory case-insensitive, top 10; TANPA search index baru). Hasil = safe projections {kind, title, courseSlug, lessonId?, snippet? (contentMd tanpa markdown, 120 char)} dan {kind: resource, title, url}. Grup "Sumber" dibuka sebagai link eksternal (tab baru, noopener noreferrer — bukan onNavigate). One mounted view: SearchView({ tenantId, tenantSlug, onNavigate? }).
notes: 0.2.0 (2026-07-16, agent gamma): STATUS row #29 (wave v1.4) — search extends to the resource board. searchInTenant gains a THIRD source: resources APPROVED-only via index by_tenant_status (eq tenantId, eq approved) bounded take(50), in-memory case-insensitive title-contains filter, top 10 — NO new search index (DATA-MODEL wave v1.4: upgrade to searchIndex only if this proves weak). New hit kind resource = EXACT {kind, title, url} (no note/submittedBy/id — asserted); pending/rejected NEVER appear (tested); member-only unchanged, no new anon path. UI: group "Sumber" renders external anchors target=_blank rel="noopener noreferrer" bypassing onNavigate (external URLs never route through openApp); hitHref returns hit.url as-is for resource. Barrel adds type ResourceHit; SearchHit union widened (breaking for exhaustive switches → minor bump). ——— 0.1.0 (2026-07-13, agent gamma): STATUS row #23 (wave v1.3). NO new tables — search indexes `courses.search_title` + `lessons.search_content` pre-added by alpha in convex/schema.ts (DATA-MODEL SSOT); implemented exactly, no schema edits. Authz: requireTenantRole(member) FIRST — anon → NOT_AUTHENTICATED, outsider/other-tenant member → NOT_AUTHORIZED (tested). q trimmed then 2..60 chars → VALIDATION_FAILED. Draft-guard: unique courseIds from lesson hits (≤15) loaded individually; only published courses' lessons survive — draft AND archived excluded (tested). Snippet strips markdown (fences, inline code, links, images, html, headings, lists, emphasis) then cuts at 120 chars + ellipsis; raw contentMd never leaves the server (tested: exact projection keys). UI: onNavigate?(href) openApp seam with next/link fallback — no os-shell import; input debounced 300ms, query skipped below 2 chars. Copy-first: rr `notifications-center`/`library` list patterns consulted; UI is thin enough that a bespoke grouped list on shadcn Input/Skeleton was the smaller lift.
